name: @le-space/ui
description: Floating Aleph sponsor relay UI components for Svelte and React.

scripts.build:publish: tsup src/shared/index.ts --format esm --dts --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.publish.json --out-dir dist/shared && tsup src/react/index.ts --format esm --dts --tsconfig tsconfig.publish.json --out-dir dist/react
